dataset_justification: IQR filter improves R² by +0.0237 on average and RMSE by -0.3875 µs/ft
features_justification: CALI systematically degrades R² (11.76% on average, 10/10 algorithms)
algorithms_excluded_note: MLPRegressor, SVR, GradientBoostingRegressor, and NuSVR also ranked in the top 8 by R², but SVR/NuSVR were excluded due to prohibitive runtime (>1200s) in LOWO with 32 wells; MLPRegressor and GradientBoostingRegressor were excluded in favor of the four tree-based methods carried forward to LOWO.
